## Question proposal

### Proposed question
<!-- Write the exact wording of the question you propose -->

### Dimension
<!-- Which of the 8 dimensions does it belong to? -->

### Tier
<!-- Required / Recommended / Optional -->

### Why this matters from a VC perspective
<!-- What underwriting question does this help answer? Be specific. -->

### Type of question
<!-- short-text, long-text, number, single-select, multi-select, etc. -->

### Scoring approach
<!-- How should this be scored? Quantitative threshold, categorical mapping, AI rubric, etc. -->

### Supporting evidence
<!-- Links to VC-side commentary, published research, or other sources that justify including this question -->

### Applies to
<!-- Stage, business models, regions -->

### Anything else
<!-- Open questions, alternatives considered, etc. -->
